extraction.one_line_summary: MARCZYŃSKI Tomasz won Stage 3 sprint from reduced bunch after attempts to split peloton on fast terrain failed.
tactical_patterns: BEPPU Fumiyuki provided leadout work for MARCZYŃSKI despite being from different teams, revealing cross-team sprint cooperation.
Teams attempted splits on flat terrain before finale, suggesting tailwind or crosswind conditions created tactical opportunities.

rider_signals.MARCZYŃSKI Tomasz: positive: twelfth career stage win at this race shows exceptional specialization in this specific event's conditions
rider_signals.BEPPU Fumiyuki: positive: leadout capability strong enough that rival sprinters will use him when their own trains fail
